description:
A health informatics company's workforce analytics team needs four business intelligence answers from the Oracle HR database. Use Oracle SQL to answer the following questions and save the results to /home/ga/Desktop/workforce_analytics_report.txt, labeling each answer clearly (Q1-Q4).

Q1: Which city has the highest average employee salary? Report the city name and average salary rounded to 2 decimal places.
Q2: Which manager has the widest direct reporting span? Report their full name and direct report count.
Q3: What is the average percentage salary increase when an employee changes jobs, comparing the salary at the start of a new role to the end of the previous role using JOB_HISTORY and EMPLOYEES data? Round to 2 decimal places.
Q4
